api-endpoint.acceptance_criteria: Endpoint returns expected response shape; integration test exercising the happy path + one error path passes.

schema-migration.acceptance_criteria: Forward migration, backfill, and rollback test all present; rollback test proves inverse returns pre-migration state.

a11y-bug.acceptance_criteria: axe-core reports zero new violations; keyboard navigation reaches the new element; visible-focus ring present.

prompt-tune.acceptance_criteria: After prompts_version bump, /prompt-analytics shows the new version's done_rate >= 0.95 of the prior best-trusted version across 20+ terminal transitions.

dep-bump-major.acceptance_criteria: verify_staged green, no SYMBOL_UNRESOLVED, release notes captured in the commit body.
